MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-520385 WITH CASE CGC-13-530490
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVIN R. BACHO OF BLEDSOE LLP, TEL. NO. 981-5411 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ALLEN LEE AND TT LEE CORPORATION DBA ALLEN LEE PLUMBING CORPORATION'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-520385 WITH CASE CGC-13-530490 is Granted, for good cause shown.
